channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Joel Embiid struck in face fighting for rebound, ruled out for rest of 76ers' game against Pacers
item.description: Joel Embiid left the Philadelphia 76ers’ game against the Indiana Pacers shortly before halftime Friday night after being struck in the face going for a defensive rebound.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lindsey Vonn eager for her return to World Cup ski races next weekend in Switzerland at age 40
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn now has a firm target for her return to World Cup ski racing at age 40: next weekend for a pair of super-G events in St. Moritz, Switzerland. She has a goal, too, and it's not showing up at the starting gate simply to show up.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trae Young, Hawks hoping to win big in Vegas at the NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Trae Young might be the NBA's biggest enigma. Young's fans can point to numbers and say he's an elite player. His detractors can point to numbers and say he's overrated. Both arguments have validity. To some, his cocky ways are endearing. To others, they're infuriating.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pro Football Hall of Famer Randy Moss reveals cancer diagnosis, 6-hour surgery
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver Randy Moss says he is being treated for cancer and is recovering from major surgery.
item.dc:creator: Zach Allen, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers after his refusal to enter a game, Kyle Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco coach Kyle Shanahan said linebacker De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers moving forward after he refused to enter a game after losing his starting job.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Poway 16-year-old starts nonprofit to deliver basketballs for the holidays
item.description: William Ralston's bedroom might look like an ordinary teenage boy's roo, but it is his very own Santa Claus-style workshop.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Caitlin Clark White privilege comment sparks intense, personal argument between Riley Gaines and Jemele Hill
item.description: Riley Gaines' latest online spat with a left-leaning figure came against journalist Jemele Hill regarding Caitlin Clark's recent 'White privilege' comments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs rookie Xavier Worthy calls it 'dream come true' having Patrick Mahomes as his quarterback
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs rookie Xavier Worthy discussed his relationship with quarterback Patrick Mahomes, saying it is a "dream come true" to have the 3-time MVP leading him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers LB De'Vondre Campbell refuses to enter game after losing his starting spot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter Thursday night's game in the third quarter after losing his starting job when Dre Greenlaw returned from an injury.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Rams get 4 field goals to beat the 49ers 12-6 in a sloppy game
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Four nights after winning the highest-scoring game of the NFL season, the Los Angeles Rams won the only game this year that didn't have a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jones, Jefferson help No. 3 Iowa State rally past Iowa, 89-80
item.description: IOWA CITY, Iowa (AP) — Curtis Jones scored 23 points, Joshua Jefferson added 19 points and 10 rebounds and No. 3 Iowa State overcame a 13-point deficit to beat Iowa 89-80 on Thursday night. Iowa State (8-1) snapped a four-game road losing streak in the series.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 1 school board gives necessary approval on Arlington Park property tax deal with Bears; 2 more to go
item.description: PALATINE, Ill. — The Bears have moved one step closer to a property tax agreement on the 326-acre site of the former Arlington International Racecourse in northwest suburban Arlington Heights.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Miami's Ward, Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty, and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON AP College Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dodgers reach $17M, 1-year deal with Conforto and $22M, 2-year contract with Treinen, AP sources say
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers agreed to a $17 million, one-year contract to add outfielder Michael Conforto and a $22 million, two-year deal to retain right-hander Blake Treinen, people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Brayden Point's 4-point night leads the Lightning over the Canucks 4-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored twice and added two assists, and the Tampa Bay Lightning edged the Vancouver Canucks 4-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
